records.ety: [L. hibernare, hibernatum, fr. hibernus wintry. See Hibernal.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Hibernated (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Hibernating (?).]

defs: To winter; to pass the season of winter in close quarters, in a torpid or lethargic state, as certain mammals, reptiles, and insects.
quotes: Inclination would lead me to hibernate, during half the year, in this uncomfortable climate of Great Britain.
